old_column.content: Build Accessible React Apps with Speed ⚡️

new_column.content: Build Accessible React Apps with Speed ⚡️

old_column.content: Chakra UI provides a set of accessible, reusable, and composable React

new_column.content: Chakra UI provides a set of accessible, reusable, and composable React

old_column.content: components that make it super easy to create websites and apps.

new_column.content: components that make it super easy to create websites and apps.

old_column.content: For older versions, head over here => https://chakra-ui.com

new_column.content: For older versions, head over here => https://chakra-ui.com

old_column.content: - Ease of Styling: Chakra UI contains a set of layout components like `Box` and

new_column.content: - Ease of Styling: Chakra UI contains a set of layout components like `Box` and

old_column.content: `Stack` that make it easy to style your components by passing props.

new_column.content: `Stack` that make it easy to style your components by passing props.

old_column.content: - Flexible & composable: Chakra UI components are built on top of a React UI

new_column.content: - Flexible & composable: Chakra UI components are built on top of a React UI

old_column.content: - Accessible. Chakra UI components follow the WAI-ARIA guidelines specifications

new_column.content: - Accessible. Chakra UI components follow the WAI-ARIA guidelines specifications

old_column.content: - Dark Mode 😍: Most components in Chakra UI are dark mode compatible.

new_column.content: - Dark Mode 😍: Most components in Chakra UI are dark mode compatible.
